cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five people on the team: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has an initial position. Then there are several swaps. I need to track each swap step by step to figure out where Bob ends up. First, let me list the initial positions: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Cheerleader - Eve: Goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So initially, Dave is Cheerleader and Bob is Right Midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes Right Midfielder and Bob becomes Cheerleader. Let me note that down. After first swap: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Cheerleader - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Right Midfielder - Eve: Goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Before this swap, Dave is Right Midfielder and Eve is Goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes Goalkeeper and Eve becomes Right Midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: Right Winger - Bob: Cheerleader - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Right Midfielder Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Before this, Alice is Right Winger and Bob is Cheerleader. After swapping, Alice becomes Cheerleader and Bob becomes Right Winger. After third swap: - Alice: Cheerleader - Bob: Right Winger - Claire: Left Winger - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Right Midfielder Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions. Before this, Dave is Goalkeeper and Claire is Left Winger. After swapping, Dave becomes Left Winger and Claire becomes Goalkeeper. After fourth swap: - Alice: Cheerleader - Bob: Right Winger - Claire: Goalkeeper - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Right Midfielder Fifth swap: Dave and Eve trade positions again. Before this, Dave is Left Winger and Eve is Right Midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes Right Midfielder and Eve becomes Left Winger.
